Important Points to Remember
The readers should remember the following important JX)ints while
interpreting Yogas:
{ 1) If the planet involved in Raja Yogas or Ohana Yoga extremely weak
and afflicted its results will not be felt and the native will only
experience adversities.
( 2) A planet if in a bad Yoga but strongly placed for example in exalted
Navamsa aspected by benefics it will give good results.
( 3) The Yogas should be reckoned in oasams.a also when studying the
horoscope for the native's career.
Success in Business
To see whether the native will be successful in business study the
following houses :
(i) Second House because it is the house of wealth.
(ii) Fifth house because it is the house of gains from investments and
risk taking.
(iii) Tenth house because it is concerned with the native~ career and
